title: DIY Wedding Projects!
excerpt: First, I just have to admit that though JC and I recently got engaged, we haven't done any wedding planning yet... whatsoever. We haven't set a date. We haven't thought of a location. We haven't talked about any particulars. After…
body:
First, I just have to admit that though JC and I recently got engaged, we haven't done any wedding planning yet... whatsoever. We haven't set a date. We haven't thought of a location. We haven't talked about any particulars. After being together for 6 years, buying a home, having a baby, and then getting engaged, we clearly aren't in any sort of hurry.

That being said, I got excited when I was approached about a DIY Wedding projects. Actually, I should back up just a bit. I recently joined the Kin Community. I am super excited to a part of the MCN (multi-channel network) and am really looking forward to putting together more videos and creative content for you all! You can see my creator page on Kin under the Home & DIY category. The first collaborative project that they approached me about had a pretty tight timeframe, but I was eager to get started and jump right in. 

You can check out my video here and watch the entire playlist here. The other creators made awesome projects and I am seriously considering getting out some fabric for these adorable pouches. It's been a while since I've used my sewing machine for anything other than paper. And I may even attempt these cement planters as we are obsessed with succulents and small plants we can actually keep alive. What are your thoughts - did you do any cool DIY wedding projects I should know about, in case, you know, I actually start planning my wedding one of these days?

SUPPLIES:
Instax Share printer | More about the Instax Share printer in this post | Washi Tapes | Washi Tape Dispenser |
Shaped Paperclips | Fiskars 12-inch paper trimmer | American Crafts adhesive | Watercolor set |Simon Says Stamp inks | Travel stamp set by Evalicious | the other stamp set is coming soon in my next collection!

Would LOVE if you subscribed to my channel and helped spread the word to anyone you know who might enjoy these videos as well!
